# Initech

Initech is a publicly listed technology company focused on improving its MSCI ESG rating, which has been held back by gaps in pay-equity disclosure. The engagement combines MSCI ratings gap remediation with SBTi near-term target setting, aligning ESG improvement with the company's broader investor relations narrative. Priya Nair leads from the investor-facing side while Tom Hasegawa coordinates operational data across global business units.
